languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

languages.text: "Я затрудняюсь определить количество органического материала, что использован в убранстве обители. Эстетика сих творений безусловна, функциональность же сомнительна".
"I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."
languages.original_text: "Я затрудняюсь определить количество органического материала, что использован в убранстве обители. Эстетика сих творений безусловна, функциональность же сомнительна".

"I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

languages.text: «Tengo dificultades para cuantificar el material orgánico utilizado en la decoración de este claustro. La estética de estas creaciones es impresionante, pero su funcionalidad es dudosa».
languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

traits.locale_text: «Tengo dificultades para cuantificar el material orgánico utilizado en la decoración de este claustro. La estética de estas creaciones es impresionante, pero su funcionalidad es dudosa».

languages.text: 「この回廊の装飾に用いられた有機材料を定量化するのに、私は苦労しています。これらの創作物の美的価値は否定しがたいものですが、その機能性は疑わしいですね」
languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

traits.locale_text: 「この回廊の装飾に用いられた有機材料を定量化するのに、私は苦労しています。これらの創作物の美的価値は否定しがたいものですが、その機能性は疑わしいですね」

languages.text: “我很难量化评估装饰这间修道院的有机材料。它们的美学价值毋庸置疑，但实用性有待商榷。”
languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

traits.locale_text: “我很难量化评估装饰这间修道院的有机材料。它们的美学价值毋庸置疑，但实用性有待商榷。”

languages.text: "Es fällt mir schwer, die bei der Dekoration dieses Klosters verwendeten organischen Materialien zu quantifizieren. Die Ästhetik dieser Kreationen ist unbestritten, aber ihre Funktionalität ist zweifelhaft."
languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

traits.locale_text: "Es fällt mir schwer, die bei der Dekoration dieses Klosters verwendeten organischen Materialien zu quantifizieren. Die Ästhetik dieser Kreationen ist unbestritten, aber ihre Funktionalität ist zweifelhaft."

languages.text: « Je peine à quantifier les matériaux organiques utilisés pour la décoration de ce cloître. Le caractère esthétique de ces créations est indéniable, mais je doute de leur utilité. »
languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

traits.locale_text: « Je peine à quantifier les matériaux organiques utilisés pour la décoration de ce cloître. Le caractère esthétique de ces créations est indéniable, mais je doute de leur utilité. »

languages.text: "Bu manastırın dekorasyonunda kullanılan organik malzemenin miktarını belirlemekte zorlanıyorum. Bu yaratımların estetiği yadsınamaz ama işlevsellikleri şüpheli."
languages.original_text: "I am struggling to quantify the organic material used in the decoration of this cloister. The aesthetics of these creations are undeniable, but their functionality is doubtful."

traits.locale_text: "Bu manastırın dekorasyonunda kullanılan organik malzemenin miktarını belirlemekte zorlanıyorum. Bu yaratımların estetiği yadsınamaz ama işlevsellikleri şüpheli."
